## Description
Brief description of the change.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added or updated; `pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if needed (README, `docs/`, docstrings)
- [ ] No unrelated changes; PR is focused

## Related
